activities_projects.title: Roman Numeral Arithmetic
steps: Write Roman numerals for numbers from 1 to 50
Add and subtract two Roman numerals without converting to Hindu numerals
Verify the answers by converting to the Hindu-Arabic system
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands arithmetic operations in Roman numerals

activities_projects.title: Create a Base-5 Number System
activities_projects.objective: Understand number systems with different bases
steps: Write numbers from 1 to 20 in the decimal system
Convert them into base-5 representation
Explain how the place values change in base-5

activities_projects.title: Ancient Number System Comparison
steps: Choose three number systems such as tally marks, Roman numerals and Hindu-Arabic numerals
Represent numbers 1–15 in each system
Compare their advantages and disadvantages
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyses efficiency of different number systems

activities_projects.title: Roman Numeral Puzzle
steps: Create five puzzles using Roman numerals
Exchange puzzles with classmates
Solve the puzzles and explain the reasoning
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves logical thinking with Roman numerals

activities_projects.title: Base System Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Investigate how different bases represent numbers
steps: Choose a number such as 25
Represent it in base-5 and base-2
Explain the difference in representation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands representation of numbers in different bases

activities_projects.title: Number System Timeline Research
activities_projects.objective: Explore the development of number systems
steps: Research early systems like tally marks, Egyptian numbers and Roman numerals
Create a timeline showing their development
Highlight the emergence of the Hindu–Arabic number system

activities_projects.title: Design Your Own Number System
steps: Create symbols for numbers 1–10
Define rules to represent larger numbers
Demonstrate addition using your system

activities_projects.title: Large Roman Numeral Conversion
activities_projects.objective: Convert large numbers into Roman numerals
steps: Write numbers such as 356, 789 and 1450
Convert them into Roman numerals
Explain the grouping process used

activities_projects.title: Counting System Investigation
steps: Research how different cultures counted using body parts or groups
Write examples of systems based on 2, 5 or 20
Explain their advantages and limitations

activities_projects.title: Decimal vs Other Bases Project
activities_projects.objective: Compare decimal system with other base systems
steps: Choose base-10 and another base such as base-5
Write numbers from 1–20 in both systems
Explain how place values differ
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands place value across number systems
